"vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1220", "name": "Insufficient Granularity of Access Control"}], "description": "## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.20`
- Patched version: `2026.4.20`

## Impact

The agent-facing `gateway config.patch` / `config.apply` guard did not cover several operator-trusted settings, including sandbox policy, plugin enablement, gateway auth/TLS, hook routing, MCP server configuration, SSRF policy, and filesystem hardening. A prompt-injected model with access to the owner-only gateway tool could persist changes to those settings.

This is a model-to-operator guard bypass, not a remote unauthenticated gateway compromise. Severity is medium.

## Fix

OpenClaw now blocks model-driven gateway config mutations for the broader operator-trusted path set and covers per-agent overrides and array-entry patching.

Fix commit:

- `fe30b31a97a917ecc6e92f6c85378b6b20352422`

## Release

Fixed in OpenClaw `2026.4.20`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:51:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:51:11Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/fe30b31a97a917ecc6e92f6c85378b6b20352422", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Agent gateway config mutations could change protected operator settings", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-25T23:51:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7jm2-g593-4qrc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Agent gateway config mutations could change protected operator settings
